page: OVHcloud l40s-360 is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for intensive computational workloads. It features 60 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 9124 processors running at 2.75 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 360 GB of system memory, providing 6 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the server integrates four NVIDIA L40S GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined 192 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a 25 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier performance in large language model (LLM) inference tasks. Prompt processing and text generation speeds for small (135M), medium (7B), and large (70B) models consistently rank in the top 10% of tested systems. Multi-threaded operations also show high efficiency, with bzip3 decompression reaching top-tier status. General CPU capabilities, including stress-ng multi-core performance, Geekbench software compilation, and ray tracing, fall within the top 25% tier. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is strong, though large-block read and write speeds remain in the average tier.

From a resource density perspective, the l40s-360 offers a balanced allocation of dedicated CPU cores, high-capacity GPU memory, and high-speed network throughput, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient platform for specialized deployments. The absence of simultaneous multithreading (1.0 thread per core) ensures predictable, dedicated execution. This configuration is designed for large language model inference, machine learning training, parallel data decompression, ray tracing, and high-throughput database operations.
description: OVHcloud l40s-360 is a dedicated GPU-accelerated server designed for intensive compute and machine learning workloads. It features 60 dedicated physical cores on an AMD EPYC 9124 processor running at 2.75 GHz, paired with 360 GB of RAM and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. The server's primary acceleration comes from four NVIDIA L40S GPUs with a total of 192 GB VRAM. Benchmarks show top-tier performance in LLM inference across small, medium, and large models, as well as top-tier multi-threaded decompression. General CPU performance, software compilation, and ray tracing benchmarks rank in the top 25%. With a 25 Gbps network baseline, this KVM-based instance is configured for AI model deployment, parallel data processing, and demanding graphics rendering tasks.
og_description: OVHcloud l40s-360 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 60 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 360 GB RAM, 400 GB NVMe storage, and four NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 192 GB VRAM for top-tier LLM inference.
meta_description: OVHcloud l40s-360 is a GPU server with 60 AMD EPYC cores, 360 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA L40S GPUs, configured for LLM inference and compute-heavy tasks.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated server featuring four accelerators and dedicated AMD EPYC cores for advanced machine learning and parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA L40S GPUs providing a total of 192 GB VRAM
60 dedicated AMD EPYC 9124 physical cores with 360 GB RAM
Top-tier performance in LLM inference and multi-threaded decompression
400 GB local NVMe SSD storage and 25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Designed for AI model deployment, ray tracing, and data science workloads
